result.rationale: Build + perf + e2e are excellent (Lighthouse 96/100/100/100, 20/20 E2E pass). Visual review at 71 flags real fixable spec gaps: connection lines nearly invisible; hero overlay low-contrast over core; skills section lacks ModuleBadge/SkillBar overlays; projects section too visually similar to skills (no execution-layer distinct state); contact section missing the ping form and proper heading. One polish iteration should lift visual to ~82-85 and push overall above target.

recommendations.issue: Lines core→modules not readable in Projects screenshot despite opacity tween.
recommendations.patch: In components/three/ConnectionLines.tsx: bump default LineMaterial linewidth to 2.5, add transparent glow via additive blending + a thicker soft copy with 0.4 opacity; in ProjectsSection tween connections target to 1.0 (was 0.8); bump Bloom intensity or threshold to catch thin lines.

recommendations.issue: 'SYSTEM // BOOT' headline overlapping glowing core at low contrast.
recommendations.patch: Move hero headline off-center (grid-cols-2 layout on desktop) and raise to z-10 with solid dark gradient scrim (bg-gradient-to-r from-bg via-bg/80 to-transparent) behind text. Also boost tracking on display headline (tracking-tighter → tracking-normal+) and add text-shadow on hover.

recommendations.issue: Sub-panel skill lists are thin DOM; spec calls for ModuleBadge + SkillBar components showing per-module proficiency.
recommendations.patch: Create components/ui/SkillBar.tsx (animated GSAP-scrubbed width bar with glow) and ModuleBadge.tsx (icon+label chip). In SkillsSection render 8-10 SkillBars per active module, each tweening width 0% → skill.level% with stagger on sub-step activation. Flip between sets between sub-steps.

recommendations.issue: Projects scene state too similar to Skills; spec calls for an 'Execution Layer' feel with connection network activated and a horizontal pinned carousel of ProjectCard floats.
recommendations.patch: In ProjectsSection, in addition to opening connection lines, tween core to position [0, 0.6, 0] (slight lift) and scale 1.4 with slower rotation; change card layout from vertical grid to horizontal-scroll pinned row (ScrollTrigger horizontal pin tween x translate) — each card with rotate-y parallax; increase card z-depth with CSS perspective-1600 transform-style-preserve-3d.

recommendations.issue: Missing 'Ping the core.' heading, contact form / magnetic-button CTA, and proper '// 06' section eyebrow.
recommendations.patch: In ContactSection: add eyebrow '// 06 SIGNAL TRANSMISSION', headline 'Ping the core.', and a 3-field GlassPanel form (name, email, message) with MagneticButton (mouse-attract via GSAP quickTo). Keep existing CTA links below the form. Also strengthen the pulsing-orb effect with a clearer outward-ring keyframe (expanding torus or drei <Trail>).
